hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\", d.get(\"path\", \"\")))" 2>/dev/null); GIT_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [[ -z "$GIT_ROOT" ]]; then exit 0; fi; if [[ -n "$FILE_PATH" && "$FILE_PATH" != "$GIT_ROOT"* ]]; then exit 0; fi; BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [[ -z "$BRANCH" ]]; then exit 0; fi; if [[ "$BRANCH" == "main" || "$BRANCH" == "master" || "$BRANCH" == dev/* ]]; then echo "BLOCKED: On branch \"$BRANCH\" — call EnterWorktree first to create a session branch."; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'rm -f /tmp/claude-task-active-$(date +%Y%m%d); echo "--- Worktree Health ---"; ~/.claude/scripts/worktree-health.sh 2>/dev/null; echo "------------------------"; TODAY=$(date +%Y-%m-%d); if ! ls ~/.claude/briefs/${TODAY}-*.md >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "--- Generating Morning Brief [$(date +%H:%M)] ---"; BFILE=$(bash ~/.claude/scripts/session-brief.sh 2>/dev/null); echo "Brief: ${BFILE}"; fi; DOW=$(date +%u); if [[ "$DOW" == "1" ]] && ! ls ~/.claude/briefs/memory-health-${TODAY}.md >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "--- Running Memory Health Check [$(date +%H:%M)] ---"; HFILE=$(bash ~/.claude/scripts/memory-health.sh 2>/dev/null); echo "Health: ${HFILE}"; fi; BRIEF=$(ls -t ~/.claude/briefs/${TODAY}-*.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [[ -n "$BRIEF" ]]; then echo "--- Morning Brief ---"; cat "$BRIEF"; echo "---------------------"; fi'
